US Stock Impact | Baseline EMKRI 0.2700 NORMAL
EM CONTAGION TRANSMISSION LOGIC: When EMKRI spikes, USD strengthens (UUP BULLISH) as capital flees to safety. EM equity ETFs (EEM, VWO, EWZ) fall on both direct EM asset repricing and USD headwinds. GLD and TLT rise as safe-haven recipients. DBC (commodities) falls as EM demand destruction hits commodity prices.
Stock / ETFTickerDirection on EMKRI SpikePrimary ChannelSensitivityNote
iShares MSCI EM ETFEEM ↓ BEARISH multi_em_stress_channel 0.90 Direct EM exposure — primary EMKRI barometer stock
Vanguard EM ETFVWO ↓ BEARISH multi_em_stress_channel 0.88 Broad EM — tracks EEM but includes frontier markets

iShares MSCI KoreaEWY ↓ BEARISH multi_em_stress_channel 0.80 Korea: high trade openness, contagion transmission via China link

SPDR Gold TrustGLD ↑ BULLISH multi_em_stress_channel 0.82 Flight-to-quality — EM crisis historically strongest GLD catalyst
iShares 20Y TreasuryTLT ↑ BULLISH spread_blowout_channel 0.75 Safe-haven bid — capital flight from EM bonds to UST
Invesco DB USD BullishUUP ↑ BULLISH currency_contagion_channel 0.88 EM FX collapse = USD strengthens; strongest BULLISH signal in EM crisis
UUP as EM Crisis Barometer: The USD Bullish ETF (UUP) is the single most reliable real-time indicator of EM contagion stress. When EM FX baskets collapse (>15%), capital concentrates into USD — UUP typically rallies 5–12% in a multi-EM crisis event. Monitor UUP + EEM ratio as the EMKRI real-time proxy.
Q3 2026 Outlook — EM Contagion Signal Calendar
Three conditions that would escalate EMKRI from NORMAL to WATCH:
🔴 EMBI+ spreads breach 450bps sustained for >5 trading days (KC_03 approach)
🔴 IIF reports EM outflows >$20B/month for 2 consecutive months (KC_04 approach)
🔴 3 EM central banks forced to emergency hike in same week (KC_01 approach)
Any single condition crossing → EMKRI trajectory shift to WATCH zone.

Key EMKRI Insight — The Trifecta Trigger for KC_01:
KC_01 fires when ≥5 EM countries enter simultaneous CRITICAL stress. The historical trifecta that causes this: (1) Fed surprise hawkish pivot → (2) DXY +5% in 30 days → (3) commodity price collapse. Each event alone moves 1–2 countries to CRITICAL. All three simultaneously push 5–8 countries there. Monitor the EMKRI as a leading warning of the trifecta assembling — not the crisis itself.

Batch 8 Systemic Financial Risk Stack

EM_CONTAGION_AGGREGATOR (Domain 179)  ·  STABLECOIN_CRYPTO_RISK (Domain 180)  ·  SHADOW_BANKING_NBFI (Domain 181)

The Batch 8 canaries monitor the three non-traditional systemic risk vectors in the 2020s global financial system. A simultaneous CRITICAL alert across all three domains (≥5 EM in crisis + stablecoin depeg + prime MMF break-the-buck) represents the 2008-class systemic financial event that CivilisationOS is designed to detect at first emergence.

Supply Chain Risk Intelligence
Chokepoint · Freight Rate · Critical Minerals · Nearshoring · Logistics
SCRI  0.3100  WATCH

Em Contagion Aggregator Canary operates a emerging, mid-tier supply chain network, with growing logistics infrastructure but limited redundancy — single-port dependencies and thin inventory buffers amplify chokepoint shocks. Maritime chokepoint exposure is concentrated across: Strait of Hormuz (significant dependency, weight 0.50); Suez Canal (significant dependency, weight 0.40); Strait of Malacca (moderate dependency, weight 0.35); Panama Canal (moderate dependency, weight 0.30).

Critical import dependencies include USD liquidity, IMF facilities, correspondent banking.

is identified as a nearshoring beneficiary — attracting manufacturing FDI as global supply chains diversify away from China. This elevates near-term logistics complexity but structurally reduces long-run single-supplier dependency.

Primary exports — EM sovereign bonds, commodity exports, portfolio flows — are sensitive to global freight rate movements and trade route disruptions.

SCRI 0.3100 WATCH — Structural supply chain sensitivity is elevated. Chokepoint and critical import dependencies warrant close monitoring. A single trigger event (Strait closure, export ban, major port strike) could escalate to ELEVATED within days.

Watch signals: Strait of Hormuz closure or capacity restriction → immediate freight rate spike  |  FDI slowdown or political reversal on nearshoring → deferred logistics investment  |  SCFI/WCI/BDI freight index spike above 2-standard-deviation threshold → freight stress trigger

Real Estate Risk Intelligence
Property Price · Mortgage Stress · Commercial RE · Developer Debt · REIT
RERI  0.2800  WATCH

Em Contagion Aggregator Canary is classified as a emerging-market real estate market. Primary stress vector is emerging market simultaneous stress cascade, currency contagion, and sovereign spread blow-out. Commercial real estate exposure is moderate CRE exposure with manageable vacancy pressures.

As an emerging market, real estate is exposed to dual risks: domestic credit tightening and external capital outflows. Currency depreciation compounds mortgage stress for dollar-denominated property loans.

Developer stress is flagged as active. Developer debt overhang and pre-sale structure failures are live risk vectors — similar to the Evergrande cascade in China. This is the highest-weight RERI driver for , pushing the composite score materially above baseline.

RERI 0.2800 WATCH — Structural real estate vulnerabilities are present but not acute. Monitor property price indices, mortgage delinquency rates, and CRE vacancy data. Stress could escalate if interest rates remain elevated.

Watch signals: Developer bond defaults or pre-sale refund demands → cascade risk  |  Property price index 3-month decline exceeding 2% → KC_RE01 trigger  |  Capital outflow episode → property market freeze and liquidity withdrawal

Insurance Risk Intelligence
Natural Catastrophe · Reinsurance · Property Withdrawal · Financial Guaranty · Climate
INRI  0.3900  WATCH

Em Contagion Aggregator Canary faces 3 identified primary natural catastrophe perils: Hurricane / Typhoon, Flood, Drought. High-severity events (Hurricane / Typhoon) are present — these carry the highest economic loss potential and are most likely to cause reinsurance market dislocations.

The insurance market in is shallow, with limited domestic capacity and heavy reliance on offshore reinsurance. Reinsurance profile: high reinsurance dependency — most catastrophic risk ceded offshore.

Climate risk classification: Tier 3 — high climate vulnerability; physical and transition risks are material and accelerating. Physical climate risks — including intensifying storm frequency, sea level rise, and heat stress on agriculture — are expected to materially increase insured losses over the medium term, potentially triggering insurer withdrawal from high-risk zones and creating insurance coverage gaps.

INRI 0.3900 WATCH — Insurance market faces structural vulnerabilities. Nat-cat exposure and/or reinsurance dependency requires monitoring. A major catastrophic event could expose coverage gaps rapidly.

Watch signals: Major Hurricane / Typhoon event → test of reinsurance capacity and coverage adequacy  |  Global reinsurance market hardening (Jan or July renewals) → premium spike or capacity withdrawal  |  Insurer non-renewal notices in high-risk zones → coverage gap emergence  |  Sovereign disaster declaration without insurance backstop → fiscal cliff  |  Cat bond spread widening → forward signal of reinsurance market stress
